tweets.author: crypto.at.thenote.app
tweets.text:
Why a selloff in gold and silver is dragging bitcoin down

Bitcoin has long been lumped in with precious metals as a hedge against a weakening dollar. That trade is unwinding on a hawkish Fed, and bitcoin is falling alongside the metals it was supposed to rival.
#btc #crypto #new

tweets.author: rwatimes.bsky.social
tweets.text: ➤ Strategy's treasury model, built around Bitcoin holdings and funded by equity, debt, and preferred shares, faces scrutiny regarding its ability to meet fixed obligations amidst market stress.

tweets.author: rwatimes.bsky.social
tweets.text: ➤ The proposed Bitcoin sale would address Strategy's cash obligations and preferred stock costs, which are currently under pressure due to STRC trading below $100 and rising dividend yields.

tweets.author: rwatimes.bsky.social
tweets.text: ➤ Grayscale's Zach Pandl suggests Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) could restore market confidence by selling over $3 billion in Bitcoin, rather than increasing preferred stock dividends.
